final: The tests are now passing. The issue was that the `total()` function in `solution.py` was using `xs[:-1]`, which excluded the last element of the list when calculating the sum. I fixed it by changing it to `sum(xs)`, which correctly sums all elements in the list.

transcript.result:
from solution import total
assert total([1,2,3])==6
assert total([])==0
print('OK_PASS')

transcript.final: The tests are now passing. The issue was that the `total()` function in `solution.py` was using `xs[:-1]`, which excluded the last element of the list when calculating the sum. I fixed it by changing it to `sum(xs)`, which correctly sums all elements in the list.
